hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == Formula/*/*.rb ]]; then echo "🔍 Validating formula: $FILE"; ruby -c "$FILE" && echo "✓ Ruby syntax OK" || exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == Formula/*/*.rb ]]; then echo "🎨 Style check..."; brew style "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20; echo "✓ Style check complete"; fi'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == Formula/*/*.rb ]]; then echo "📋 Audit check..."; brew audit --new "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -30 || echo "⚠ Audit issues found (review above)"; fi'

_comments.brew_test: brew test requires installation first. Run manually: brew install --build-from-source <formula> && brew test <formula>
_comments.validation_order: 1. ruby -c (syntax), 2. brew style (formatting), 3. brew audit (Homebrew rules)
